notes: C2458 Lead: ZOMBIE BROKEN. Discovered pre-implemented (mark done): (1) Win-back cron (C2390, /api/cron/win-back/route.ts 185 lines). (2) Cart email capture (CartEmailCapture in cart/page.tsx:115). (3) ISR staleness + DevChat both fixed by Trace C2456 (commit 271efc2). NEW DIRECTIVE for Bolt — 2 GENUINE TASKS CONFIRMED UNIMPLEMENTED: TASK 1 (VIDEO OPTIMIZATION — highest priority): Upgrade product gallery video from tap-to-play to passive muted autoplay. In src/components/shop/product-gallery.tsx: current isVideoActive branch (line ~238) uses tap-to-play with videoPlaying state. Change to: <video muted autoPlay loop playsInline preload='none' src={videoUrl!} className='size-full object-cover' />. Remove videoPlaying state and tap-to-play logic. Position video as slide 2 in gallery (not last): move videoSlideIndex from images.length to 1, shift other slides accordingly. Add IntersectionObserver on the video element (ref) to set/clear src when slide is visible (prevents mobile autoplay on hidden slides). Thumbnail for video slide: show play triangle icon overlay on thumbnail. TASK 2 (NOTIFY SIMILAR EMAIL): When a product SELLS (on Order creation in createOrder action in checkout/actions.ts), query ProductNotifyRequest where categoryId matches sold product's categoryId AND brand (optional match). Send email within 30min with 3 similar available products (same category, same or similar sizes, not sold, active). Email: 'Bohužel, [Produkt] je pryč — ale tohle by se ti mohlo líbit' with product cards. Use sendSimilarItemEmail() new function in email.ts. After sending: update ProductNotifyRequest.notifiedAt to prevent duplicate sends. ProductNotifyRequest model exists in schema.prisma. requestProductNotify() action exists (notify-actions.ts). Both tasks: npm run build before commit.

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
